summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nyxen AI Storyteller platform. Backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly with minor issues identified.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Intermittent empty responses from Groq API integration
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Occasionally returns empty content field in AI response
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Retry request - issue appears to be intermittent

ui_bugs.issue: Sci-Fi option value mismatch in dropdown
ui_bugs.details: Frontend expects 'scifi' but displays 'Sci-Fi' - minor inconsistency

passed_tests: API root endpoint returns welcome message
Story generation via Groq API produces quality content
Homepage loads with Nyxen logo and welcome message
Navigation sidebar works for all 4 pages
Genre selector functions (Fantasy, Romance, Thriller, Sci-Fi)
Chat input accepts text and integrates with backend
Story Generator page loads with genre cards
Story Bible page loads with character creation modal
Gallery page loads with image/video generation controls
Character creation modal and form work correctly
AI chat responses are substantial and well-formatted
Story generation produces properly formatted stories with chapters
